name: Chat with Any Data — Exa Search + Firecrawl Scrape + AI
description: Ask a question about any topic: Exa searches the web for relevant sources, Firecrawl scrapes the best result for full content, Claude AI answers the question using the gathered data, and posts the answer to Slack.

source.originalName: AI chat with any data source (using the n8n workflow tool)

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the answer

question.description: The question you want answered (e.g. 'What are the latest trends in AI agents?')

steps.name: Search the web for relevant sources via Exa
Pick the best source URL to scrape
Scrape the best source with Firecrawl
Build AI prompt with all gathered data
Run Claude AI to answer the question
Parse AI response and strip fences
